definition:
ἐκτός, 
  adv. [in LXX Jdg.8:26 20:15, 3Ki.10:13, al. (בַּד, Jdg.5:28 (בַּד), בַּד), Sng.4:1-3 (בַּד), al, ;] 
  1. as adv., outside, beyond: τὸ ἐ., with poss. genitive, the outside, Mat.23:26; in late Gk. (see Deiss., BS, 118), pleonastic, ἐκτός εἰ μή, 1Co.14:5 15:2, 1Ti.5:19. 
   2. With force of prep., with genitive; 
   (a) outside of: 1Co.6:18, 2Co.12:2; 
   (b) beyond, besides, except: Act.26:22, 1Co.15:27.†
 (AS)
